longBusinessSummary: ATP Yazilim ve Teknoloji Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, develops enterprise software and system solutions in Turkey, the Netherlands, Malta, China, and Europe. The company offers restaurant POS, customer experience, O2O and delivery, restaurant management, and MDM and support center services under the Zenia brand; brokerage software, portfolio management, RPA and automation, mobile and virtual branch, finance applications, and market connectivity solutions under the Tradesoft brand; CRM, ERP and e-accounting, custom business solutions, and corporate support services under the Digital brand; green and carbon certificates trading under the GreenX brand; and autonomous robots under the RobotX brand. It also provides cloud computing and artificial intelligence solutions; business solutions, including ERP, CRM, and BI ve HR, e-transformation, capital markets, and robotic; infrastructure and security solutions, such as data security, and threat and system management; system solutions comprising database, switchboard, data leak prevention, payment and barcode, and UPS systems; and IT services, which include licensing, integration, and research and development consultancy, as well as managed, professional, and field services. It serves hospitality, finance, retail, energy, and logistics sectors. The company was formerly known as ATP Ticari Bilgisayar Agi ve Elektrik Guc Kaynaklari Uretim Pazarlama ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to ATP Yazilim ve Teknoloji Anonim Sirketi in April 2023. ATP Yazilim ve Teknoloji Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
